cleavage agent: the peptide mixtures were digested with trypsin by using S-Trap cartridges.
enrichment method: An affinity purification – mass spectrometry (AP-MS) experiment was set up...
fragmentation method: by fragmenting the 10 most intense ions in CID modality.
instrument: analyzed by nanoLC-MS/MS using the Easy-nLC II chromatographic system coupled with a LTQ Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer.
labeling: the total proteomes from MCF7 and MCF10A cells were compared by using a label free shotgun approach.
